channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This startup hired a sci-fi novelist to give its AI companions a soul
item.description: When Quentin Farmer was getting his startup Portola off the ground, one of the first hires he made was a sci-fi novelist. The co-founders began building the AI companion company in late 2023 with only a seed of an idea: Their companions would be decidedly non-human.
item.dc:creator: Emily McCrary-Ruiz-Esparza, Fast Company

item.title: Meta and Google could be about to sign a mega AI chip deal - and it could change everything in the tech space
item.description: Rising demand, shifting alliances, and limited fabrication capacity create unpredictable conditions as Meta considers a long-term Google TPU hardware partnership.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Talk about a triple threat - IBM says it can now support up to 47PB on a full rack, so load it up
item.description: IBM expands the Scale System 6000 with higher flash density, stronger throughput, and software updates designed for large AI-driven workloads.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Want to save money on an Apple iPhone this holiday season? Try these 3 shopping hacks
item.description: Thanksgiving is behind us, which means the holiday shopping season has officially begun. And that means that both companies and third-party retailers will spend every day between now and Christmas morning trying to get you to spend your consumer dollars with them.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: How to watch Clarke vs TKV online for FREE: live stream boxing tonight; fight card and ringwalks, weigh-in results
item.description: All the ways to watch Clarke vs TKV live streams online, including for free, as the pair clash in Derby, UK, with the British heavyweight title on the line.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: Apple Watch sleep score: What your number really means
item.description: Apple's new Sleep Score feature gives you a rating for your nightly rest quality. Learn how to set it up on your Apple Watch and iPhone today.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ICYMI: the 7 biggest tech stories of the week, from ChatGPT's voice mode upgrade to the Black Friday sales
item.description: We've been finding the best Black Friday deals for you this week – but there have been plenty of other tech happenings too.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Intel dismisses reports of new hire offering TSMC tech
item.description: Intel Corp. Chief Executive Officer Lip-Bu Tan dismissed reports about a new hire taking trade secrets from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. to his company, saying the US chipmaker respects other firms' intellectual property.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Love Marvel and DC? Grab these Disney+ and HBO Max deals with over 60% off for Black Friday
item.description: I'm getting my Black Friday superhero film fix with these HBO Max and Disney+ offers that pack a cost-cutting punch.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: EU ‘Chat Control’ proposals should be red flag to businesses everywhere
item.description: Data privacy campaigners have warned that any celebration of the news that the European Union (EU) has abandoned its plans to break end-to-end encryption in mobile messaging apps could be short-lived.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Four important lessons about context engineering
item.description: Context engineering has emerged as one of the most critical skills in working with large language models (LLMs). While much attention has been paid to prompt engineering, the art and science of managing context—i.e.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: An immigration agent’s use of ChatGPT for reports is raising alarms. Experts explain why
item.description: Tucked in a two-sentence footnote in a voluminous court opinion, a federal judge recently called out immigration agents using artificial intelligence to write use-of-force reports, raising concerns that it could lead to inaccuracies and further erode public confidence in how police have handled the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: This project is using AI and satellite data to create the first definitive map of the entire continent of Africa
item.description: Africa’s official maps are stuck in the past, often either outdated, incomplete—or both. But governments don’t have the budgets to fix them, making it difficult to complete projects as complex as deciding where to put new solar plants to as simple as delivering a package.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company

item.title: HP announces job cuts as profit outlook falls short of estimates
item.description: HP Inc. gave a profit outlook for current year that fell short of estimates and the company said it will cut 4,000 to 6,000 employees through fiscal 2028 by using more AI tools.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft loses two senior AI infrastructure leaders as data center pressures mount
item.description: Microsoft has lost two senior data center and AI infrastructure leaders at a time when the company is racing to expand capacity for its Copilot and Azure AI services, raising questions about its ability to meet surging demand for power-intensive AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Snowflake to acquire Select Star to enhance its Horizon Catalog
item.description: Snowflake has signed a definitive agreement to acquire San Francisco-based startup Select Star’s team and context metadata platform to enhance its Horizon Catalog offering, the company said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google issues warning on fake VPN apps
item.description: Google warns Android users about dangerous fake VPN apps hiding malware that steals passwords, banking details and personal data from phones and tablets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple now lets you add your passport to your phone's Wallet
item.description: Apple's digital passport feature lets iPhone users breeze through TSA checkpoints this holiday season using Digital ID technology at 250+ airports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
